name: Crimson Oathkeeper
title: Bears the unbreakable vow

abilities.name: Oath of Iron
abilities.text: All allies take 50% damage while this card stands. Heal 40.

abilities.name: Keeper's Reprisal
abilities.text: Deal 110. +40 more if an ally was KO'd this game.

typed_abilities.name: Oath of Iron
typed_abilities.text: All allies take 50% damage while this card stands. Heal 40.

typed_abilities.name: Keeper's Reprisal
typed_abilities.text: Deal 110. +40 more if an ally was KO'd this game.

flavor_text: Once she spoke the word, the guild bent around it.
